author: y4rr
content: Decision: unary_map itself can't be fixed generically (takes arbitrary closures, can't dispatch to GPU). But most callers already have GPU dispatch before reaching unary_map. The actionable fix is adding a clamp_f32 GPU kernel + dispatch in the clamp() forward function. This unblocks Huber/SmoothL1 loss backward refactors and is commonly used in gradient clipping. The special.rs functions (erf, lgamma, etc.) are rarely hot-path and can stay CPU for now.
